arms.milp_bench: solve_sourcing, us_only=True — reproduces published benchmark MILP arm

notes: All arms scored through the same landed_cost_breakdown().
The cost model has NO holding-cost term; decomposition is component / fixed per-supplier fee / variable freight / consolidation charge.
greedy's fallback can order above an offer's stock; such plans are flagged in arms.greedy.stock_violations and are physically infeasible.
